data.description: Canonicalize registered agent config for lease identity. Keep `model` as the raw CLI identifier. Add explicit canonical fields for lease metadata: `agent_type`, `vendor`, `provider`, `agent_name`, `lease_model`, and `version`. Remove stored `label` as an identity source. Add explicit parsing and legacy-config rewrite/backfill for Codex, Claude, and OpenCode. Make pool references resolve from persisted agent ids rather than runtime naming conventions.
